items.title: Встреча с Сергеем Бескрестновым – Flash. Мы очень подробно обсудили все, что сейчас наиболее критично в технологических аспектах нашей обороны. Именно технологии спасают жизни наших воинов и возвращают эту войну домой – в Россию. Также важно всегда оперативно реагировать на военные новации, которые армия агрессора внедряет в свои силы и возможности, руководствуясь одним принципом: мы знаем детали и поэтому можем эффективно противодействовать. Мы с Сергеем договорились максимально тесно сотрудничать. Решения последуют. Спасибо!
items.original_title: A meeting with Serhii Beskrestnov – Flash. We had a very detailed discussion about everything that is currently most critical in the technological aspects of our defense. It is technology that saves the lives of our warriors and brings this war back home – to Russia. It is also important to always respond promptly to the military innovations the aggressor's army is introducing in its forces and capabilities, guided by one principle: we know the details and thus can counteract effectively. Serhii and I agreed to cooperate as closely as possible. Decisions will follow. Thank you!

items.original_title: Iran strikes eastern Syria, in first such attack during current war
items.rss_summary: BEIRUT, July 17 (Reuters) - Iran struck eastern Syria on Friday, Iranian state media and a Syrian military source said, in the first known attack by Tehran on Syrian territory since a regional war erupted earlier this year.Iran's Revolutionary Guards said they had attacked a U.S. special operations command centre at al-Tanf in Syria in retaliation for the killing of Iranian soldiers in Iranshahr, state media reported.

items.rss_summary:
The United States and Iran traded attacks on Friday, with Tehran targeting American assets across the Middle East in the biggest escalation since the two foes returned to outright war.
As part of the wider escalation, the United States has also reimposed its blockade of Iran's ports.
